detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	113學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 高齡福祉科技 (Gerotechnology)	開課班級 : 長照四	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 朱僑麗	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
This is an undergraduate-level introduction to the field of living e-technology, assistant and aging. This class will provide a focus on selected issues that currently characterize this field. The course will introduce the issue of physical and mental aging, the application of high technology on aging process, and the concept of design for older people. Our goal for this class is to help you understand the basic concepts and theoretical perspectives which have directed the high technology application.
